title: Tweaked49 Beta
body:
Small Tweaks for Textures in Beta Minecraft. More versions comming soon.

## Edited Textures:

### terrain:
- Outlined gold, iron, coal, diamond, redstone, lapis Ore
- Clear Glass
- Wheat Level 7
- Netherrack
- More contrast on "stone-like" blocks (pistons, furnace, etc.)
- [b1.7+] pre beta 1.7 cobblestone

### gui:
- Dark Mode GUI
- Hotbar
- Buttons
- Options Background to planks

### items:
- Short wood, stone, iron, diamond, gold Swords

### misc:
- transparent pumkpin blur
